title: Trusted by Many
description: From startups to large enterprises, discover how SonnaLab turns ideas into concrete technological success.

items.name: Marie Dubois
items.title: CEO, TechStart
items.text: SonnaLab transformed our vision into reality. Their technical expertise and innovative approach enabled us to launch our SaaS platform in record time. An exceptional team!

items.name: Laurent Martin
items.title: CTO, EcoTech
items.text: SonnaLab's technological advice saved us from costly mistakes. Their external CTO positioning gave us access to top-notch expertise. Results: +200% performance.

items.name: Sophie Leroy
items.title: Founder, EdTech Solutions
items.text: The mobile app developed by SonnaLab exceeded our expectations. With an intuitive interface, excellent performance and on-time delivery, they are a trusted partner!
